figures.caption: Figure 2: Vector field plots of one diagonal and two rotated solutions, denoted by D1, R1 and R3 in suffix, with Deflation PINNs and FEM.
Figure 3: Diagonally stable molecular alignments: (a) D1, (b) D2 states and rotated stable molecular alignments: (c) R1, (d) R2, (e) R3, (f) R4 states. See Maity et al. (2021a) for more details.
Figure 4: Vector field plots of one diagonal and two rotated solutions, denoted by D1, R1 and R3 in suffix, with Deflation PINNs and FEM.
